  "actions": [
    "Halt the alignment process immediately",
    "Adjust the axial spacing of the machines to bring the coupling gap within OEM and API 686 specifications",
    "Perform a soft-foot check before proceeding to final laser alignment"

  "rationale": "According to API 686 and standard laser alignment procedures, the coupling axial gap must be set and verified within tolerance before final angular and parallel alignment can be completed. Proceeding with an out-of-spec coupling gap will cause premature coupling wear, thrust bearing overload, or incorrect alignment readings.",

    "API RP 686 Chapter 5",
    "Laser Alignment System Manual - Pre-alignment Checklist"
  ]
